'''chajugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oidium|oidium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oidium|oidium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chajugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæjigith|chæjigith]] || [[word:chæjigij|chæjigij]] || [[word:chæjigish|chæjigish]] || [[word:chæjigi|chæjigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chajujuguth|chajujuguth]] || [[word:chajujuguj|chajujuguj]] || [[word:chajujugush|chajujugush]] || [[word:chajujugu|chajujugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chajuguth|chajuguth]] || [[word:chajuguj|chajuguj]] || [[word:chajugush|chajugush]] || [[word:chajugu|chajugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chajufguth|chajufguth]] || [[word:chajufguj|chajufguj]] || [[word:chajufgush|chajufgush]] || [[word:chajufguf|chajufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chajuguthu|chajuguthu]] || [[word:chajuguju|chajuguju]] || [[word:chajugushu|chajugushu]] || [[word:chajuguku|chajuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chajuguth|chajuguth]] || [[word:chajuguj|chajuguj]] || [[word:chajugush|chajugush]] || [[word:chajugu|chajugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chajuguthul|chajuguthul]] || [[word:chajugujul|chajugujul]] || [[word:chajugushul|chajugushul]] || [[word:chajugukul|chajugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chajuguthuthu|chajuguthuthu]] || [[word:chajugujuju|chajugujuju]] || [[word:chajugushushu|chajugushushu]] || [[word:chajuguku|chajuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chajuguthun|chajuguthun]] || [[word:chajugujun|chajugujun]] || [[word:chajugushun|chajugushun]] || [[word:chajugukun|chajugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chajuguthuoro|chajuguthuoro]] || [[word:chajugujuoro|chajugujuoro]] || [[word:chajugushuoro|chajugushuoro]] || [[word:chajugukuoro|chajugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
